name: NPCWorld
tagline: LLM NPCs roam a live world map and react to each other
description: A multiplayer browser game: street view (or zoomed map), a thought every 5s, then LLM/heuristic action scores (move, speak, rest, attack) for the next world step.

stack.frontend: Next.js 14 + Street View embed + Leaflet fallback

env_vars.description: Public base URL used for metadata/logging
Optional. Google Maps Embed API key for live Street View; without it, uses zoomed Leaflet map.
